title: Project: Healthy Habits Photo Strips
objectives: Document personal healthy habits through photos
Present healthy habits to the class using photo strips

key_concepts.explanation: Students take photos of themselves doing healthy habits (brushing teeth, eating fruit, exercising, washing hands, sleeping). They paste 8 photos into two film strip frames and present to the class, describing each habit.

solution_steps: Take photos of yourself doing healthy habits
Paste the photos in the film strips (8 frames total)
Talk about your healthy habits to your class
examples.answer: Two completed film strips with 4 photos each showing healthy habits
examples.visual_description: Two film strip frames with 4 photo spaces each, example images of boy exercising, brushing teeth, and washing hands

teaching_notes: This project makes healthy habits personal and visual. Students photograph their own routines — builds ownership. The film strip format is fun and creative. Presentation practises present simple: 'I brush my teeth twice a day.' 'I eat vegetables every day.'
